unit.comment: /*************************************************************************** * _ _ ____ _ * Project ___| | | | _ \| | * / __| | | | |_) | | * | (__| |_| | _ <| |___ * \___|\___/|_| \_\_____| * * Copyright (C) Daniel Stenberg, <daniel@haxx.se>, et al. * * This software is licensed as described in the file COPYING, which * you should have received as part of this distribution. The terms * are also available at https://curl.se/docs/copyright.html. * * You may opt to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute and/or sell * copies of the Software, and permit persons to whom the Software is * furnished to do so, under the terms of the COPYING file. * * This software is distributed on an "AS IS" basis, WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY * KIND, either express or implied. * * SPDX-License-Identifier: curl * ***************************************************************************/
/* * The Strict-Transport-Security header is defined in RFC 6797: * https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc6797 */
/* The last 3 #include files should be in this order */
/* to play well with debug builds, we can *set* a fixed time this will return */
/* allow for "adjustments" for unit test purposes */

function.name: hsts_debugtime
Curl_hsts_init
Curl_hsts_cleanup
hsts_create
function.parameter_list: (struct hsts *h, const char *hostname, bool subdomains, curl_off_t expires)

function.name: Curl_hsts_parse

unit.comment: /* * Return TRUE if the given host name is currently an HSTS one. * * The 'subdomain' argument tells the function if subdomain matching should be * attempted. */

function.name: Curl_hsts
hsts_push
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, struct curl_index *i, struct stsentry *sts, bool *stop)

function.name: hsts_out
Curl_hsts_save
hsts_add
hsts_pull

unit.comment: /* * Load the HSTS cache from the given file. The text based line-oriented file * format is documented here: https://curl.se/docs/hsts.html * * This function only returns error on major problems that prevent hsts * handling to work completely. It will ignore individual syntactical errors * etc. */

function.name: hsts_load
Curl_hsts_loadcb
Curl_hsts_loadfiles
